nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 48. Southwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 7am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog between 7am and 8am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 55, with temperatures falling to around 44 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
